title: LawInternshipApplication
description: An application to the NYC Law Department's legal internship / fellowship / law-student program — the net-new WRITE surface for this domain. The Law Department is an agency-facing legal office with almost no citizen-facing transactions; the one thing a member of the public actually initiates is applying to work there (careers/lawyers-law-students). There is NO public API and NO Open Data twin for applications today; the 'Careers' page points applicants to email/PDF instructions. This schema serves both the write surface (submit an application) and the read surface (list/get an applicant's own submissions).

applicationId.description: Server-assigned application reference number. Omit on create; returned on the created resource.

status.description: Lifecycle status. Set by the Law Department, not the applicant.

program.description: Which recruitment track the application targets.

barAdmitted.description: Whether the applicant is admitted to a bar.

coverLetter.description: Free-text cover letter / statement of interest.
